calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Petition To Confirm Trust Assets (Per Ost)
Off Calendar Nov-07-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John O'Reilly (Counsel for Thomas McAley, Trustee).

After Mr. O'Reilly addressed the Court's concern as to whether the trust failed for want of a corpus (noting the Trustor's transfer of the subject real property out of the trust solely for refinancing purposes), the Court took the matter under submission.
